stemHtml:
Which interpretation of the following message is correct?

LFLD AD WRNG 1 VALID 050300/050700 RIME OBS 0300Z=

options.a: AD warning forecasting rime ice to be present at the airport at 0300 z, which may also affect parked aircraft, valid from 0300 z to 0700 z.
options.b: Rime ice was observed at 300 ft on approach.
options.c: AD warning about rime ice which was observed at the airport at 0300 z, and may also be affecting parked aircraft, valid from 0300 z to 0700 z.
options.d: Rime ice observed by arriving or departing traffic at 0300 z and will be predicted to stay until 0700 z.
